74859.subject: The Daily Degen - June 20th, 2026
74859.body:
View this post on the web at https://thedailydegen.substack.com/p/the-daily-degen-june-20th-2026

Happy Saturday friends! Lots of stuff going on!
Let’s dive in!
As always… stats/alerts/etc at top and tweets/news/links/videos/etc at bottom… and all tweets are hyperlinked so just click on them to pull them up on Twitter/X!
Market Update
Crypto (from @CryptoBubbles
Total Crypto Market Cap: $2.277T
QQQ (Nasdaq 100): $740.62
Gold: $4,154.70
Silver: $64.71
Oil (WTI): $76.54
US 10Y Treasury: 4.455%
Crypto Fear & Greed Index (from coinmarketcap(dot)com): 21
Biggest Price Movers
(From @coingecko top 1000, by 24 hour change)
Spotlight
While prices might be in goblintown, there are still untold defi teams getting after it and shipping hard and continuing to build the financial rails the global economy will one day run on!
And a prime example are the dedicated gents at @rocksolidHQ [ https://substack.com/redirect/1dd565fa-afc6-447c-9c64-3bda46076061?j=eyJ1IjoiMXN4Zm00In0.wehL2Vke0PUDz1PHD6ZKtcy1ufIoeqpblecCEEWPpqI ]!
RockSolid is an extremely cool project built by co-founders Ben Ward @wardy_ben [ https://substack.com/redirect/d0f857c2-73ca-4256-b475-0901023296a8?j=eyJ1IjoiMXN4Zm00In0.wehL2Vke0PUDz1PHD6ZKtcy1ufIoeqpblecCEEWPpqI ], and Steve Pack @paladin_eth [ https://substack.com/redirect/f890c3fc-921f-46f4-9af1-b1b2757a810a?j=eyJ1IjoiMXN4Zm00In0.wehL2Vke0PUDz1PHD6ZKtcy1ufIoeqpblecCEEWPpqI ]… designed to bring the best yield-maxxing opportunities possible to the world of defi!
They now have two such vaults: a) the Rocksolid $rETH Vault [ https://substack.com/redirect/2bcfd973-2371-4c2c-bc2b-4090a316ca79?j=eyJ1IjoiMXN4Zm00In0.wehL2Vke0PUDz1PHD6ZKtcy1ufIoeqpblecCEEWPpqI ], and b) the RockSolid AutoPlus Looped $ETH Vault [ https://substack.com/redirect/fdd89059-1fe0-4bc8-9e9e-679bfc8022be?j=eyJ1IjoiMXN4Zm00In0.wehL2Vke0PUDz1PHD6ZKtcy1ufIoeqpblecCEEWPpqI ]!
If you want a great breakdown of everything RockSolid is doing, check out the two excellent interviews embedded below! The first is with Nic Carter’s Castle Island Ventures, and the second is with the Rocket Fuel podcast! 
Also make sure to follow RockSolid on Twitter/X [ https://substack.com/redirect/1dd565fa-afc6-447c-9c64-3bda46076061?j=eyJ1IjoiMXN4Zm00In0.wehL2Vke0PUDz1PHD6ZKtcy1ufIoeqpblecCEEWPpqI ] for more updates as well, and stay tuned as we continue shining a light on everything they are doing!
Biggest TVL Movers + Other Interesting Data
Chains are quite green today. 15 of the top 25 chains are green on the weekly. 
Protocols are also quite green today. 14 of the top 25 protocols are green on the weekly. 
Here’s The Top 12 Fastest-Growing Chains By TVL On The Weekly With At Least $1M TVL (from @DefiLlama):
Here’s The Top 12 Fastest-Growing Protocols By TVL On The Weekly With At Least $1M TVL (from @DefiLlama):
Here’s The Top 10 Entities By 7 Day Fee Generation (from @DefiLlama):
New Projects
(note: this includes new projects we find through combing Twitter each day and

74852.subject: Europeans should learn to love the air-conditioner
74852.body:
<link rel=stylesheet href=https://marber-cdn.economist.com/foundations/latest/css/font-face.css>
 The Economist

 
 


 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
https://click.e.economist.com/?qs=ABB7InYiOjEsImQiOjQ5MTN9AAcAAAAAAvfgCVPoJfolUd2LwjNwzio4hn1li2sTdcUxF4-ME1PkouOoVdF1UjUc4CUL1GVSwe1MJMNNPtpUNicFLAtMnysGyAZ-ZuuMRDnE1NYKAY8 

June 20th 2026

 

 
 
 
The Economist Today

 Our best journalism, handpicked each day


 
 
 

 
https://click.e.economist.com/?qs=ABB7InYiOjEsImQiOjQ5MTN9AAcAAAAAAvfgCVPpGFmOP4uhylo7cMOPG2mi5arsdrykWQ4VEIf-gN5UmPdA7Zl47dEPPfzpb5Oas4lX6ozDOGhzPZ2PmzwHMA_F-CN6Uoz6qGtRhHo 

https://click.e.economist.com/?qs=ABB7InYiOjEsImQiOjQ5MTN9AAcAAAAAAvfgCVPqE0yrRDJEmtS26NKnl251PHQwRH3NFRXrSoECEE2SpU7RdEA6_8in3vlRCflr4AjGYdaL9d9sOisdnG5xMpeCFM1kY7f_37E5Fow 



 
 
Dominic Rech

Senior newsletter editor



 It’s a scorching weekend across western Europe. To cope with the heat, our Charlemagne column has some advice: don’t feel guilty about lowering the thermostat. As the world warms and Europe increasingly turns to cheaper, cleaner energy, the continent needs to 
 
https://click.e.economist.com/?qs=ABB7InYiOjEsImQiOjQ5MTN9AAcAAAAAAvfgCVPrIpUnwAK6XuhJ9WU3QmF0YMXodzWQuyniapPs7pHBZDcc4jftXXehE0cA9unt3-_7kyVeL62Cp5q-Y07Og0AyfC1u7hmiRQ 
rethink its attitudes towards air-conditioners .
 


 Elsewhere, a peace agreement between America and Iran has given relief to oil markets. But 
 
https://click.e.economist.com/?qs=ABB7InYiOjEsImQiOjQ5MTN9AAcAAAAAAvfgCVPs8325PgGII_xjbv8iREXvdfONOwYS_4_D04ewOPAW7McoCVSUcasOjH9aSdZ1c7YWsvcue9t9QIfTZ__ZTz

74851.subject: Spark Fund 2: A Lower Minimum. The Same Big Names.
74851.body:
Exposure to OpenAI, PsiQuantum, Ripple, and more with one check

New Launch | Spark Fund 2 (https://dxszHp04.na2.hubspotlinks.com/Ctc/DR+113/dxszHp04/VW8Q0T7P1kFFW2TZwcR4v_QxlW63xJzN5Qx2qqN8SvFG43pyd0W8wLKSR6lZ3p-N2vHy0yfHQypMXj7tqDFw5gW97Mrzk2sN7lnW9hzjtM5MrtNRVYSWt27dc8L7W45jJbW6VjcnjW4dh7l48sMdcQW3wCSzf1WQ9bWW2hQGmj8yHF8YVdp5np3XJK7pW6JWz2J6GPYYGW4LMwLb6WSkGxW5SKvv562Tf6SW59PN5W5pvXcFW2RpZtF5gQw3mN8c0Z3D6DGnfN57LryHMjGgKW5r4Xdy4c15YKW2nF3QN1VmSjWM2cy7ZF92B_W87sPlw6Fw1s0W5x0Gr885cLsMW31R6g51Z7s-DW4hWPSx3gB_hGW2pY4fV5Kvsq_N8Q1DQ38TzsTW7qCSDh7qhhPxW3YX3nx2rDYDBf6BYTbd04 )

Hi Oleg,

Many sought-after private opportunities also come with some of the highest barriers to entry.

That's why we launched the Spark Fund 2 (https://dxszHp04.na2.hubspotlinks.com/Ctc/DR+113/dxszHp04/VW8Q0T7P1kFFW2TZwcR4v_QxlW63xJzN5Qx2qqN8SvFG43pyd0W8wLKSR6lZ3p-N2vHy0yfHQypMXj7tqDFw5gW97Mrzk2sN7lnW9hzjtM5MrtNRVYSWt27dc8L7W45jJbW6VjcnjW4dh7l48sMdcQW3wCSzf1WQ9bWW2hQGmj8yHF8YVdp5np3XJK7pW6JWz2J6GPYYGW4LMwLb6WSkGxW5SKvv562Tf6SW59PN5W5pvXcFW2RpZtF5gQw3mN8c0Z3D6DGnfN57LryHMjGgKW5r4Xdy4c15YKW2nF3QN1VmSjWM2cy7ZF92B_W87sPlw6Fw1s0W5x0Gr885cLsMW31R6g51Z7s-DW4hWPSx3gB_hGW2pY4fV5Kvsq_N8Q1DQ38TzsTW7qCSDh7qhhPxW3YX3nx2rDYDBf6BYTbd04 ) , featuring a lower minimum compared to some of our other multi-offering Funds.

With one check, accredited investors can gain exposure to a portfolio of companies driving significant advancements in AI, quantum computing, digital assets, and more.

The Fund is headlined by multiple previously sold-out offerings:

-

OpenAI, which filed an S-1 for what could be “one of the largest [IPOs] in history.”¹

-

PsiQuantum, a quantum leader with $1B raised from investors like NVIDIA.²

-

Ripple, creator of digital asset Infrastructure trusted by partners like JPMorgan.³

A confidential filing does not guarantee that an IPO will occur. Additionally, there’s no guarantee that these companies’ valuation or revenue will continue to grow, or that they will be profitable. Regulation of cryptocurrencies is a hotly contested political and legal issue. As a result, Ripple has been the subject of state and federal scrutiny. Future legal or regulatory developments could impact the company’s operations. See the offering page for additional details.

On top of that, you’ll also have exposure to several innovative companies leveraging AI across industries, including Writer, You.com, Instabase, Kore.ai, Fireblocks, and AMP Robotics.

View the Spark Fund 2
(https://dxszHp04.na2.hubspotlinks.com/Ctc/DR+113/dxszHp04/VW8Q0T7P1kFFW2TZwcR4v_QxlW63xJzN5Qx2qqN8SvFG43pyd0W8wLKSR6lZ3p-N2vHy0yfHQypMXj7tqDFw5gW97Mrzk2sN7lnW9hzjtM5MrtNRVYSWt27dc8L7W45jJbW6VjcnjW4dh7l48sMdcQW3wCSzf1WQ9bWW2hQGmj8yHF8YVdp5np3XJK7pW6JWz2J6GPYYGW4LMwLb6WSkGxW5SKvv562Tf6SW59PN5W5pvXcFW2RpZtF5gQw3mN8c0Z3D6DGnfN57LryHMjGgKW5r4Xdy4c15YKW2nF3QN1VmSjWM2cy7ZF92B_W87sPlw6Fw1s0W5x0Gr885cLsMW31R6g51Z7s-DW4hWPSx3gB_hGW2pY4fV5Kvsq_N8Q1DQ38TzsTW7qCSDh7qhhPxW3YX3nx2rDYDBf6BYTbd04 )

Investment
